reviews.comment:
Tiene el estilo variada y servicios de las clásicas ACA. Se puede tramitar el registro internacional sin ser socio. El combustible es más económico que en la mayoría, además del descuento que hacen a socios. Bien ubicado en una zona pintoresca y segura de devoto.

(Translated by Google)
It has the varied style and services of a classic ACA. You can apply for international registration without being a member. Fuel is cheaper than most, in addition to the member discount. Well located in a picturesque and safe area for worshippers.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11887773088728540195/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBZ183Yk5REAE

reviews.comment:
El servicio que me brindaron nada que ver con las palabras. Tenés el servicio del seguro para tu auto y no te solucionan nada, el que me atendió en suvoz se notaba que me estaba boludeando, no dejaba expresar mi accidente, la verdad que después del choque necesitas contención que te guíen que trámites, en teoría  el seguro tiene que ayudarte a hacer los trámites, pero bueno no tuve esa suerte. Adiós ACA no tuve una buena experiencia con uds.

(Translated by Google)
The service I received was nothing like the description. You have car insurance coverage and they don't do anything to help. The person who answered the phone sounded like he was messing with me; he wouldn't let me explain my accident. Honestly, after a crash you need support and guidance through the paperwork. In theory, the insurance company is supposed to help you with the paperwork, but unfortunately, I wasn't so lucky. Goodbye ACA, I didn't have a good experience with you.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11887773088728540195/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNZZ0plcGN3EAE
